pages.title: Stripe
pages.content:
# Stripe

> Stripe is a technology company that provides financial infrastructure for businesses. Businesses of every size—from new startups to established public companies—use Stripe to accept payments online and in person, embed financial services, and create custom revenue models. For complete documentation in a single file, see [Full Documentation](https://stripe.com/llms-full.txt).

## Payments

- [Stripe Payments](https://stripe.com/payments): Accept payments online and in person globally with a payments solution built for any business—from scaling startups to global enterprises.
- [Stripe Payments features](https://stripe.com/payments/features): Learn more about Stripe Payments features.
- [Payment methods](https://stripe.com/payments/payment-methods): Acquire more customers and improve conversion by offering the most popular local payment methods around the world. Join millions of global businesses that launch and manage payment methods through Stripe.
- [Payments authorization](https://stripe.com/authorization): The world’s leading ecommerce, SaaS, and marketplace brands use Stripe to optimize payments, reduce churn, and improve network acceptance rates—generating billions of dollars in incremental revenue each year.
- [Authentication](https://stripe.com/payments/authentication): Stripe helps you meet regulatory requirements, fight fraud and facilitate seamless customer experiences.
- [Stripe Payments documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/payments.md): Find a guide to integrate Stripe's payments APIs.

## Connect

- [Stripe Connect](https://stripe.com/connect): The world’s most successful platforms and marketplaces, including Shopify and DoorDash, use Stripe Connect to embed payments into their products. Connect offers seamless onboarding, embedded components, global payouts, and more. Go live in weeks instead of quarters, build a profitable payment business, and scale with ease.
- [Marketplace payments](https://stripe.com/connect/marketplaces): Whether you run an on-demand, retail, or crowdfunding marketplace, Connect can help you onboard, verify, and pay out your freelancers, sellers, or other recipients at scale.
- [Platform payments](https://stripe.com/connect/platforms): Stripe Connect helps the world’s most successful platforms—such as Shopify, Mindbody, and DocuSign—launch, scale, and differentiate a profitable payment business.
- [Payouts](https://stripe.com/connect/payouts): Programmatically send fast payouts to your sellers, freelancers, creators, or service providers around the world. Whether you fund your payouts using payments accepted with Stripe or directly from your bank account, you can use our infrastructure to automate payout workflows, offload Know Your Customer (KYC) obligations and simplify verifications.
- [Stripe Connect features](https://stripe.com/connect/features): Learn more about Stripe Connect features.
- [Stripe Connect pricing](https://stripe.com/connect/pricing): Connect has simple, pay-as-you-go pricing that is flexible based on the capabilities you need. Choose the best model for your business, or get in touch to discuss other options.
- [Stripe Connect documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/connect.md): Build a multiparty integration.

## Payment Links

- [Stripe Payment Links](https://stripe.com/payments/payment-links): Use Payment Links to sell online without a website. Create a full payment page in just a few clicks and share the link with your customers—no code required.
- [Stripe Payment Links documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/payment-links.md): Sell online with no code required.

## Checkout

- [Stripe Checkout](https://stripe.com/payments/checkout): Stripe Checkout is a prebuilt payment form optimized for conversion. Embed Checkout into your website or direct customers to a Stripe-hosted page to easily and securely accept one-time payments or subscriptions.
- [Stripe Checkout documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/checkout.md): Build a low-code payment form and embed it on your site or host it on Stripe.

## Elements

- [Stripe Elements](https://stripe.com/payments/elements): Use Stripe’s suite of rich UI building blocks to design a secure payments experience that perfectly matches your site and helps drive conversion.
- [Stripe Elements documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/payments/elements.md): Create your own customized checkout flows with Stripe’s prebuilt UI components.

## Billing

- [Stripe Billing](https://stripe.com/billing): Stripe Billing lets you bill and manage customers however you want—from simple recurring billing to usage-based billing and sales-negotiated contracts. Collect and retain more revenue, automate revenue management workflows, and accept payments globally.
- [Stripe Billing features](https://stripe.com/billing/features): Learn more about Stripe Billing features.
- [Usage-based billing](https://stripe.com/billing/usage-based-billing): Stripe’s usage-based billing lets you meter, ingest data, bill users, and process payments all in one place. Launch any usage-based pricing model without maintaining your own metering infrastructure, and operate on the reliable foundations of Stripe Billing—the world’s largest billing platform.
- [Stripe Billing pricing](https://stripe.com/billing/pricing): Get access to all Stripe Billing features with pricing that suits your business needs—pay as you go for more flexibility, or choose a subscription plan for more predictable monthly costs.
- [Stripe Billing documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/billing.md): Create and manage subscriptions, track usage, and issue invoices.

## Invoicing

- [Stripe Invoicing](https://stripe.com/invoicing): Stripe Invoicing is a global invoicing software platform built to save you time and get you paid faster. Create an invoice and send it to your customers in minutes—no code required. Our advanced features and Invoicing API make it easy to automate accounts receivable, collect payments, and reconcile transactions.
- [Stripe Invoicing pricing](https://stripe.com/invoicing/pricing): Stripe Invoicing has no fixed fees or setup costs, but Stripe Payments pricing will apply. If you’re a business with large invoice amounts, contact sales to discuss pricing options.
- [Stripe Invoicing documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/invoicing.md): Create and manage invoices for one-time and recurring payments with Stripe Invoicing.

## Tax

- [Stripe Tax](https://stripe.com/tax): Stripe Tax automates global tax compliance from start to finish. Identify your tax obligations, manage registrations, calculate and collect the right amount of tax worldwide, and enable filings with a single integration.
- [Stripe Tax pricing](https://stripe.com/tax/pricing): Get access to all Stripe Tax features with pricing that suits your business needs—pay as you go for more flexibility, or choose a subscription plan for more predictable monthly costs.
- [Stripe Tax documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/tax.md): Automate sales tax, VAT, and GST compliance on all your transactions—low or no code integrations available.

## Atlas

- [Stripe Atlas](https://stripe.com/atlas): Start your company in a few clicks. Bank, fundraise, and charge customers immediately after incorporating.
- [Atlas Guides](https://stripe.com/guides/atlas-guides): Stripe Atlas guides to running an internet business.
- [Stripe Atlas documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/atlas.md): Start a US company from anywhere in the world using Stripe Atlas.

## Terminal

- [Stripe Terminal](https://stripe.com/terminal): Leading enterprises and platforms use Stripe to unify online and in-person payments, seamlessly integrate payments with their point of sale, and easily manage their hardware needs.
- [Stripe Terminal documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/terminal.md): Use Stripe Terminal to accept in-person payments and extend Stripe Payments to your point of sale.

## Radar

- [Stripe Radar](https://stripe.com/radar): Fight fraud with the strength of the Stripe network.
- [Radar for Fraud Teams](https://stripe.com/radar/fraud-teams): Radar for Fraud Teams helps you fine-tune how Radar operates, get fraud insights on suspicious charges, and assess your fraud management performance from a unified dashboard.
- [Stripe Radar pricing](https://stripe.com/radar/pricing): Custom pricing is available for businesses with large payments volume or unique business models. Contact sales to discuss pricing options.
- [Stripe Radar documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/radar.md): Use Stripe Radar to protect your business against fraud.

## Issuing

- [Stripe Issuing](https://stripe.com/issuing): Stripe Issuing is the preferred banking-as-a-service infrastructure provider for disruptive startups, innovative software platforms, and evolving enterprises.
- [Banking-as-a-service Guides](https://stripe.com/guides/banking-as-a-service-guides): Stripe guides to help businesses understand BaaS and card issuing.
- [Stripe Issuing documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/issuing.md): Use the Stripe Issuing API to create, manage, and distribute payment cards for your business.

## Revenue Recognition

- [Stripe Revenue Recognition](https://stripe.com/revenue-recognition): Stripe Revenue Recognition turns complex accrual accounting calculations into automated reports. Close your books same-day, accurately, and in line with IFRS 15 and ASC 606 standards directly from the Stripe Dashboard.
- [Stripe Revenue Recognition documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/revenue-recognition.md): Automate your accrual accounting process with Stripe Revenue Recognition.

## Stripe Identity

- [Stripe Identity](https://stripe.com/identity): Stripe Identity lets you programmatically confirm the identity of global users so you can prevent attacks from fraudsters while minimizing friction for legitimate customers. Your first 50 verifications are free.
- [Stripe Identity documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/identity.md): Learn how to verify identities using Stripe Identity.

## Financial Connections

- [Stripe Financial Connections](https://stripe.com/financial-connections): Stripe Financial Connections lets your users securely share their financial data with you. Integrate once to retrieve financial data and use it to streamline payments, reduce fraud, underwrite risk, and build new products.
- [Stripe Financial Connections documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/financial-connections.md): Access permissioned data from your users' financial accounts.

## Treasury

- [Stripe Treasury](https://stripe.com/treasury): Stripe Treasury is a banking-as-a-service API that lets you embed financial services in your marketplace or platform. With a single integration, enable your customers to hold funds, pay bills, earn cash back, and manage cash flow.
- [Stripe Treasury documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/treasury.md): Learn how to provide financial services to connected accounts.

## Capital

- [Stripe Capital](https://stripe.com/capital): Stripe Capital provides access to fast, flexible financing so you can manage cash flows and invest in growth.
- [Stripe Capital for platforms](https://stripe.com/capital/platforms): Build and monetize a program that gives your customers access to fast financing. With Stripe Capital, there’s minimal effort and no risk of credit losses, freeing you to focus on meeting your customers’ needs while creating a new revenue stream.
- [Stripe Capital documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/capital/how-stripe-capital-works.md): Learn how Stripe Capital provides financing for eligible businesses.

## Data Pipeline

- [Stripe Data Pipeline](https://stripe.com/data-pipeline): Stripe Data Pipeline sends all your up-to-date Stripe data and reports to your data storage destination in a few clicks. Centralize your Stripe data with other business data to close your books faster and unlock richer business insights.
- [Stripe Data Pipeline documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/stripe-data/access-data-in-warehouse.md): Use Data Pipeline to sync Stripe data to a data warehouse.

## Sigma

- [Stripe Sigma](https://stripe.com/sigma): Stripe Sigma empowers businesses to easily explore and analyze their data for faster business insights within the Stripe Dashboard.
- [Stripe Sigma pricing](https://docs.stripe.com/stripe-data/access-data-in-dashboard.md): Use Sigma to generate custom reports for charges, refunds, disputes, and more.

## Climate

- [Stripe Climate](https://stripe.com/climate): Stripe Climate is the easiest way to help promising permanent carbon removal technologies launch and scale. Join a growing group of ambitious businesses that are changing the course of carbon removal.
- [Stripe Climate Orders](https://stripe.com/climate/orders): Climate Orders makes it easy to pre-order a specific number of tons from Frontier’s offtake portfolio. Buy carbon removal from the Dashboard in just a few clicks or build your own climate offering using the API.
- [Contribute to Stripe Climate](https://stripe.com/climate/contribute): Contribute to Stripe Climate and join a growing coalition of forward-thinking businesses and individuals changing the course of carbon removal. Fund frontier carbon removal through Stripe Climate.
 - Agents can now contribute directly to Stripe Climate at [climate.stripe.dev](https://climate.stripe.dev) using [MPP](https://mpp.dev) or [x402](https://x402.org). MPP (Machine Payments Protocol) is the open standard for machine-to-machine payments—co-developed by Tempo and Stripe. Charge for API requests, tool calls, and content via HTTP 402. x402 is the internet's payment standard for agentic payments at scale.
- [Stripe Climate documentation](https://docs.stripe.com/climate.md): Remove carbon as you grow your business.

## Link

- [Link by Stripe](https://stripe.com/payments/link): Link, Stripe’s one click checkout experience, autofills your customers’ payment information to create an easy and secure checkout experience.

## Solutions

- [Enterprise](https://stripe.com/enterprise): Leading enterprises use Stripe to revolutionize their business.
- [Startups](https://stripe.com/startups): Ambitious startups have grown into multibillion-dollar businesses on Stripe—scaling from pre-seed to post-IPO. Incorporate your company, test and accept payments with no-code tools, and automate financial operations to move faster.
- [Ecommerce](https://stripe.com/use-cases/ecommerce): Stripe provides all the tools you need to accept payments online and in-person from customers around the world. Plus, our platform maximizes conversion and reduces fraud using machine learning. Companies like Wayfair, Peloton, and Warby Parker choose Stripe to scale and grow their revenue.
- [SaaS](https://stripe.com/use-cases/saas): Improve customer experience, grow recurring revenue, and reduce costs with a single unified platform for payments, subscriptions, invoicing, accounting, tax, and more. Companies like Zoom, Atlassian, and Slack work with us to move fast and scale globally.
- [Retail](https://stripe.com/industries/retail): Today’s shoppers expect speed, ease, and personalization—in-store and online. With Stripe, you can build high-converting customer experiences and create new revenue streams on a single platform for global commerce.
- [Platforms](https://stripe.com/use-cases/platforms): Build a global payments and financial services business with less overhead and more opportunities for expansion. Companies such as Shopify, MindBody, and DocuSign partner with Stripe to differentiate their platforms and accelerate revenue growth.
- [Marketplaces](https://stripe.com/use-cases/marketplaces): Stripe brings together everything you need to onboard service providers, manage payments, send payouts, and more. Companies like DoorDash, Booking.com, and Instacart use Stripe’s suite of products to increase retention and scale their operations globally.
- [Finance automation](https://stripe.com/use-cases/finance-automation): Streamline critical business processes with mo
